title: Net Music: Advanced Player
description: This mod adds a music player that supports more operations.
body:
Building upon the Net Music Jukebox, this mod introduces an Advanced Jukebox that supports extended functionalities:

1. Redstone Control
The Advanced Jukebox allows custom configuration of Redstone input and output behavior for each side. This enables the rapid construction of automated Redstone-powered music machines.

2. Item Interaction
It is possible to customize item input and output permissions for every side of the Advanced Jukebox.

3. Playback Settings
The Advanced Jukebox offers adjustable volume controls and an option for distance-independent audio playback. Additionally, lyrics display and particle effects can be configured.

4. Playback Modes
Supported playback modes include Single Loop, Sequential Play, List Loop, and Shuffle.

5. Mod Compatibility
This mod integrates with Net Music: Playlist, allowing the Advanced Jukebox to read and play song data from created playlists.
